title: Fluffy Blueberry Pancakes
content: Thick stacks of buttermilk pancakes bursting with fresh berries and drizzled with organic maple syrup.

title: Overnight Chia Seed Pudding
content: A healthy, meal-prep friendly start made with almond milk, honey, and topped with fresh mango chunks.

title: Shakshuka with Feta
content: Spiced tomato and bell pepper sauce with poached eggs, salty feta crumbles, and toasted sourdough.

title: Mediterranean Quinoa Bowl
content: Fluffy quinoa topped with cucumbers, chickpeas, kalamata olives, and a zesty lemon-tahini dressing.

title: Pesto Chicken Wrap
content: Sliced grilled chicken breast, sun-dried tomatoes, baby spinach, and nut-free basil pesto in a whole wheat tortilla.

title: Roasted Tomato Basil Soup
content: Slow-roasted vine tomatoes blended with fresh garden basil, garlic, and a touch of heavy cream.

title: Garlic Butter Pan-Seared Salmon
content: Crispy skin salmon fillets finished with a lemon-garlic butter glaze and served with steamed asparagus.

title: Slow-Cooker Beef Stew
content: Tender chunks of chuck roast with root vegetables in a rich, savory red wine and rosemary broth.

title: Mushroom Risotto
content: Creamy Arborio rice folded with sautéed cremini mushrooms, aged parmesan, and fresh thyme.

title: Spicy Thai Green Curry
content: A fragrant coconut milk-based curry with bamboo shoots, Thai basil, and served over steamed jasmine rice.

title: Sweet Potato & Black Bean Tacos
content: Roasted sweet potato cubes with smoky black beans, fresh avocado, and a tangy lime crema.

title: Eggplant Parmesan Bake
content: Layers of herb-breaded eggplant slices, homemade marinara sauce, and gooey melted mozzarella.

title: Crispy Tofu Stir-Fry
content: Extra-firm tofu cubes tossed with snap peas, bell peppers, and a ginger-soy glaze.

title: Flourless Chocolate Cake
content: A dense, rich Belgian chocolate cake topped with a light dusting of cocoa powder and fresh raspberries.

title: Classic New York Cheesecake
content: Smooth and velvety cream cheese filling on a buttery graham cracker crust with a strawberry swirl.

title: Apple Cinnamon Galette
content: A rustic, free-form tart filled with caramelized Granny Smith apples and a hint of nutmeg.

title: Salted Caramel Brownies
content: Fudgy dark chocolate brownies swirled with homemade sea-salt caramel and baked to perfection.

title: Iced Matcha Green Tea Latte
content: Whisked ceremonial grade matcha powder served over ice with creamy, unsweetened oat milk.

title: Sparkling Hibiscus Lemonade
content: A refreshing, tart floral lemonade made with dried hibiscus petals and sparkling mineral water.

title: Spiced Chai Tea Latte
content: Strong black tea slow-brewed with fresh cardamom, cinnamon sticks, cloves, and sweetened with honey.
